name: TAPAS Control Panel
description: Telegram SMS / Call / WhatsApp OTP Bomber Bot

OWNER_ID.description: Your Telegram numeric User ID — get from @userinfobot

LOG_CHANNEL_ID.description: Telegram channel ID for bot logs (e.g. -1001234567890). Set 0 to disable.

CHANNEL_USERNAME.description: Force-join channel username WITHOUT @ (leave blank to disable)

CHANNEL_LINK.description: Force-join channel invite link (leave blank to disable)

DB_NAME.description: SQLite DB filename — only used when DATABASE_URL is not set
